enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Ammaa Endraal Anbu?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary musician K. V. Mahadevan.

Which movie features the song Ammaa Endraal Anbu?

This song is featured in the Tamil movie Adimaipenn, released in 1969.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Adimaipenn?

The lead roles in the movie were portrayed by M. G. Ramachandran and Jayalalithaa.

What is the theme of the song Ammaa Endraal Anbu?

The song emphasizes the deep emotional connection and reverence associated with the concept of motherhood.

When was the movie Adimaipenn released?

The movie was released in the year 1969.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song "Ammaa Endraal Anbu" from the 1969 Tamil movie "Adimaipenn" is a heartfelt melody that celebrates the unconditional love and nurturing nature of a mother. Featuring the iconic performances of M. G. Ramachandran and Jayalalithaa, this song is a testament to the emotional depth of familial bonds. Composed by K. V. Mahadevan and penned by Vaali, the lyrics and music beautifully convey the essence of love and respect for motherhood. This classic piece continues to resonate with audiences, evoking a sense of warmth and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ammaa Endraal Anbu, a timeless melody from the classic Tamil movie Adimaipenn, resonates with the profound emotions of love and devotion. Composed by the legendary K. V. Mahadevan and penned by the esteemed lyricist Vaali, this song beautifully captures the essence of familial bonds. Featuring the iconic performances of M. G. Ramachandran and Jayalalithaa, this track remains a cherished gem in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Ammaa Endraal Anbu Song Lyrics Adimaipenn
When we say mother, it means love; when we say father, it means knowledge; when we say teacher, it means education; they are all gods in this world.
Calling a mother, a child, and a child, a mother.
The light of love and the way of kindness are found in the word 'mother'.
The moon shines in the sky, and a child is born without forgetting the pain.
From the bond of love, the protector gives his blood as a sacrifice.
When we say mother, it means love; when we say father, it means knowledge; when we say teacher, it means education; they are all gods in this world.
Nature should provide all the wealth abundantly.
Those who have nothing should also be given a share.
There is no rain for one person, and there is no moon for another.
If everything is given to everyone, it is not a habit.
When we say mother, it means love; when we say father, it means knowledge; when we say teacher, it means education; they are all gods in this world.
Language and music will become two eyes for the face.
When we feel good, there is always goodness for you and me.
In life, both highs and lows should be treated with care.
Compassionate hearts will take the form of God.
When we say mother, it means love; when we say father, it means knowledge; when we say teacher, it means education; they are all gods in this world.
